notes: Primary: CardShopLive slot-resolved 1000-pack sample (rare slot: holo V 10.5%, VSTAR/VMAX 5.56%, ultra trainer 3.5%, textured energy 2.4%, secret Pikachu 1.5%; reverse slot: Galarian Gallery 19%+10.5%+0.6%=30.1%, radiant 3%). VSTAR/VMAX split via DigitalTQ 615-pack ratio (5.2:3.74); rare-holo share 40.16% also from DigitalTQ, residual on plain rare (main set has 22 non-holo rares). TCGplayer Infinite 1900-pack study corroborates GG ~1/3 and gold ~1/125 but reports secret Pikachu 1/133 vs 1.5% here — hence medium confidence. All GG tiers share the galarian-gallery id (engine spreads uniformly over the 70 GG cards, understating gold-VSTAR scarcity). No booster display ever existed (special set); ETB holds 10 packs.
